strengths: 15+ years of polyglot full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded
Early exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, workshops, open-source founder
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise
Career level is Senior/Staff IC, not Director/Principal with strategic influence
No advanced degree or evidence of advising strategic customers/partners at scale

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
Seniority gap vs. Director-level IC scope
Breadth of engineering experience and craftsmanship

response.justification: The candidate has solid generalist engineering depth and is beginning to touch agentic AI tooling, but the role demands a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers. The resume shows neither the seniority signal nor the AI portfolio required, making this a weak fit despite genuine craftsmanship strengths.
